summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 3D South Indian wedding invitation website. Backend API fully functional with RSVP endpoints working correctly. Frontend loads successfully with all major features present, but critical RSVP form integration issue found - form doesn't save data to backend.

integration_issues.issue: RSVP form shows success message and confetti but doesn't actually call backend API to save data

ui_bugs.issue: Clipboard API permission denied error when clicking copy link button

design_issues.issue: Form row may not be properly responsive on mobile/tablet devices
3D hover effects and scroll-triggered animations may not be working as expected

passed_tests: Backend API connectivity and all endpoints (4/4 tests passed)
Preloader with glowing diya animation (2.5s duration)
Hero section with couple names, countdown timer, and parallax scrolling
Navigation bar with all links (desktop and mobile)
Our Story section with bride and groom cards
Wedding Rituals timeline with all 5 events
Venue section with Google Maps integration
RSVP form UI and validation (all form fields present)
Color scheme matches South Indian theme
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix RSVP form integration - the handleRSVPSubmit function in App.js needs to make an actual API call to POST /api/rsvp endpoint to save form data to MongoDB. Currently it only shows confetti animation without backend integration.
